headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $400
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Duane Pfennigwerth   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $385 to $400.
